tasks.context: Manually SSH into production server, pull latest orchestrator code with rejection loop fix, restart service. Orchestrator currently stops processing after first rejection. Verify service restart and queue resumption via logs.

SSH deploy backend/src/utils/task-complexity-validator.ts approved 5 days ago. This validator prevents invalid tasks from entering queue. Copy file to production, restart backend service, verify validator is active in logs.

Add health check endpoint to agents/orchestrator that reports queue status, last task processed timestamp, error count. Must expose metrics for detecting when orchestrator stops processing. Single file addition.

Submit test task through full pipeline: task creation → queue → orchestrator → MiniMax → approval. Verify rejection handling works (orchestrator continues) and complexity validator blocks invalid tasks. Document results in logs.
